subjectline.content: Let's Get to Know Each Other

html.content:
Let's get to know each other.
Let's get to know each other.
WEB VERSION
Let's get to
know each other.
We noticed your NTO profile is only 50% complete. Tell us more about you, so we can deliver more relevant offers and products just for you, right to your inbox.

Complete Profile

Northern Trail Outfitters

Earn exclusive rewards from myNTO!
Earn exclusive rewards from myNTO!
WEB VERSION
NTO Lover, what are you waiting for?

Earning exclusive offers and rewards has never been so easy! Join myNTO today and start earning points every time you shop. See more membership details below...
Join myNTO
Bronze | 100 - 5,000 Points
With Bronze level membership, you'll be enrolled in our member-only email promotions, plus for every $100 you spend, you'll get $5 back.
Silver | 5,000 - 10,000 Points
With Silver level membership, you’ll get all the perks of Bronze, plus you’ll get 25% off on your Birthday, and you can pick three additional days a year to save 25%.
Gold | 10,000 - 20,000 Points
With Gold level membership, you’ll get all the perks of Silver, plus earn double points for purchases over $100 and free two-day shipping on online orders.
Platinum | 20,000+ Points
Platinum membership is our most admired and loyal NTO customers. You’ll enjoy all the perks of Gold, plus free overhight shipping on online orders, 20% off all orders, and admission to 1 NTO Expedition per year.

Northern Trail Outfitters

subjectline.content: Gear Up for the 30-Day Referral Challenge

preheader.content: Refer 3 friends in the next 30 days to earn your $50 reward.

dct50zocawe.content:
Refer friends, earn rewards. View as a Webpage.
Share the Love. Earn $50.

$50

Refer 3 friends to NTO and we'll thank you with a $50 account credit.

Your friends get to discover what you already love about NTO, and you get rewarded for sharing the word. It's our way of saying thanks for being one of our biggest advocates.
Get Your Referral Link
How It Works
1

Share Your Link

Send your unique referral link to friends, family, and anyone you think would love NTO. 		2

They Sign Up

Your friends create an account and make their first qualifying purchase using your link. 		3

You Earn $50

After 3 successful referrals, we'll automatically apply a $50 credit to your account.

Why Friends Trust Friends
Word of mouth is how the best brands grow. When you refer someone, you're giving them the gift of products you already trust and love.
Your Friends Win Too
New customers who join through your link get an exclusive 15% off their first order. It's a perk just for being your friend.
Frequently Asked Questions
Is there a limit to how many people I can refer?

Nope! Refer as many friends as you'd like. Every 3 successful referrals earns you another $50 credit. 		When will I receive my credit?

Credits are automatically applied within 7 days of your third referral completing their first purchase.
How do I track my referrals?

Log into your account and visit the Referrals tab to see who has signed up and your progress.

VIEW DASHBOARD → 		Can I use the credit on anything?

Yes! Your $50 credit can be applied to any purchase in our store, with no minimum spend required.

SHOP NOW →
Ready to Start Earning?

Grab your unique referral link and start sharing today.
Start Referring Now
This email was sent by:
%%Member_Busname%% %%Member_Addr%% %%Member_City%%, %%Member_State%%, %%Member_PostalCode%%, %%Member_Country%%
